product_overview: ITI PROJECT MANAGER is a role-based project and task management web app for internal team coordination. Users can log in, manage projects and tasks according to permissions, review work submissions, and track notifications and activity.
core_goals: Log in and access the authenticated workspace based on role
Create and manage projects with required members and permitted assignments
Create, assign, submit, review, and reopen tasks through the workflow
Monitor deadlines, notifications, dashboard metrics, and recent activity
Manage users according to role hierarchy and access permissions

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate active users with email and password, then enter the authenticated application.
user_flows: Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/login.php -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit the login form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/login.php -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit the login form -> See an error message
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/login.php -> Enter invalid credentials repeatedly -> Submit the login form repeatedly -> See a temporary lockout message

features.name: Logout
features.description: End the current authenticated session and return to the login page.
user_flows: Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/logout.php -> See the login page

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: View KPI cards, progress metrics, deadlines, and recent activity after signing in.
user_flows: Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/login.php -> Log in with a demo account -> Open /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=dashboard -> Review KPI values -> Inspect progress and deadline sections
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=dashboard -> Use sidebar navigation -> Open other available sections

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Create projects, open project details, update project information, manage members, and archive projects when allowed.
user_flows: Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=projects -> Fill in project title, description, deadline, and members -> Submit the project form -> See the new project in the list
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=projects -> Open an existing project detail page -> Review project information, members, tasks, progress, and status
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/actions/project-detail.php?id=:id -> Edit permitted project fields -> Submit the changes -> See updated project details
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/actions/project-detail.php?id=:id -> Add or remove project members when permitted -> Confirm the change -> See the member list update
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/actions/project-detail.php?id=:id -> Archive a project when business rules allow it -> See the project marked as archived

features.name: Task Workflow
features.description: Create tasks, assign them to project members, submit proof, review submissions, reopen approved tasks, and inspect task history.
user_flows: Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=tasks -> Select a project -> Fill in task title, description, deadline, and assignees -> Submit the task form -> See the task in the list
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/actions/task-detail.php?id=:id -> Edit permitted task fields before review locking -> Submit the changes -> See updated task details
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/actions/task-detail.php?id=:id -> Enter a note and attach an optional file -> Submit proof -> See the task move into review status
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/actions/task-detail.php?id=:id -> Review submitted proof -> Approve or reject the task -> See the task status update
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/actions/task-detail.php?id=:id -> Provide a required reason -> Reopen an approved task -> See the task return to active work
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/actions/task-detail.php?id=:id -> Inspect submission and review history -> Review previous actions and notes

features.name: Task Comments
features.description: Add and delete comments on tasks for authorized participants and reviewers.
user_flows: Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/actions/task-detail.php?id=:id -> Type a comment -> Submit the comment form -> See the comment appear in the task discussion
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/actions/task-detail.php?id=:id -> Delete an allowed comment after confirmation -> See the comment removed

features.name: Notifications
features.description: View notifications, filter them, mark them read, delete them, and open linked projects or tasks.
user_flows: Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=notifications -> Review the notification inbox -> Filter by status or type -> See the list update
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=notifications -> Mark a notification as read -> See the unread state change
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=notifications -> Delete a notification after confirmation -> See it removed from the inbox
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=notifications -> Open a notification -> See the linked project or task page
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=deadlines -> Trigger a deadline reminder -> See a related notification appear

features.name: Activity Log
features.description: Review role-filtered activity records and narrow them by action, actor, or target.
user_flows: Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=activity -> Review visible activity records -> Confirm role-based visibility
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=activity -> Apply action, actor, or target filters -> See the activity list narrow to matching records
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=activity -> Open a linked task or project target -> See the related record page

features.name: User Management
features.description: Create and manage users according to hierarchy permissions, including role selection, editing, and password reset.
user_flows: Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=users -> Create a user with an allowed role -> Submit the form -> See the new user in the list
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=users -> Edit a user’s attributes or status when permitted -> Submit the changes -> See the updated user record
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=users -> Reset a user password -> Confirm the reset -> See the password reset applied
Navigate to /itipm_php_mysql_starter/index.php?page=users -> Open the Users page with an unauthorized role -> See the user redirected away from the page

routes.description: Login page for ITI Project Manager with CSRF protection, demo account hints, and login throttling.
Ends the current authenticated PHP session.
Authenticated application shell that defaults to the dashboard page.
Dashboard with KPI cards, progress metrics, deadlines, and recent activity.
Project list and project creation workflow for authorized roles.
Task list and task creation workflow with project and assignee selection.
Notification inbox with filters, mark-read actions, delete actions, and click-to-open behavior.
Activity log with role-aware visibility and filters.
User management for roles allowed by the hierarchy guard.
Project detail page with edit project, archive, member management, progress, and project task list.
Task detail page with edit task, submit proof, review, reopen, submission history, and comments.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate active users by email and password, create a PHP session, and redirect to the authenticated app.
user_interactions: Open the login page.
Fill the email input.
Fill the password input.
Click the Login button.
See the dashboard after valid credentials.
See an error message after invalid credentials.
Trigger temporary browser-session lockout after repeated invalid attempts.

features.name: Logout
features.description: End the current PHP session and return the user to unauthenticated state.
user_interactions: Click the logout link from the authenticated layout.
Return to the login flow.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: View real application metrics, project progress, deadline follow-up, and recent activity after login.
user_interactions: Login with a demo account.
Review dashboard KPI values.
Inspect progress and deadline sections.
Navigate using sidebar menu links.

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Create projects, open project details, update project metadata, manage project members, and archive projects according to role permissions.
user_interactions: Open the Projects page.
Fill title, description, deadline, and members for a new project when permitted.
Submit the project form.
Open an existing project detail page.
Edit project fields when permitted.
Add or remove project members when permitted.
Archive a project when business rules allow it.

features.name: Task Workflow
features.description: Create tasks, assign users, edit task details, submit proof, review submitted proof, reopen approved tasks, and track submission history.
user_interactions: Open the Tasks page.
Select project and fill task title, description, deadline, and assignees when permitted.
Submit a new task.
Open a task detail page.
Edit task fields when allowed and not locked by review state.
Submit proof with a note and optional file.
Approve or reject submitted proof as a reviewer.
Reopen an approved task with a required reason.
Inspect submission and review history.

features.name: Task Comments
features.description: Add and delete task comments for authorized task participants and reviewers.
user_interactions: Open a task detail page.
Type a comment.
Submit the comment form.
Delete an allowed comment after confirmation.

features.name: Notifications
features.description: View, filter, mark, clear, delete, and open notifications linked to projects or tasks.
user_interactions: Open the Notifications page.
Filter notifications by status or type.
Mark notifications as read.
Delete a notification.
Click a notification to open its linked project or task.
Trigger deadline reminders from the Deadlines page.

features.name: Activity Log
features.description: Review role-filtered activity records and filter by action, actor, or target.
user_interactions: Open the Activity page.
Apply action, actor, or target filters.
Open linked activity targets when available.

features.name: User Management
features.description: Create users, edit users, reset passwords, and enforce role hierarchy constraints.
user_interactions: Login as SUPERADMIN, ADMIN, or MODERATOR.
Open the Users page when role permits it.
Create a user using allowed role options.
Edit user attributes and status when permitted.
Reset a user password.
Verify unauthorized roles are redirected away from the Users page.

known_limitations.issue: Dynamic detail URLs require existing database IDs for reliable end-to-end tests.
known_limitations.impact: Tests that open project or task detail pages should discover records from list pages or use seeded fixture data.

known_limitations.issue: Some destructive actions use browser confirm dialogs.
known_limitations.location: project member removal, project archive, notification deletion, and comment deletion forms
known_limitations.impact: Automated tests need to accept confirmation dialogs before asserting final state.

known_limitations.issue: External Tailwind CDN is loaded on the login page.
known_limitations.impact: Visual styling may degrade if the test environment cannot reach the CDN, though PHP functionality remains testable.
